free_text: Spectra of photoneutrons from the reactions
C-12(gamma,n)C-11 and O-16(gamma,n)O-15.
Stilbene crystal of 1 in. thickness  and 1 in.
in diameter was used as a detector.
Statistical error of measurements.
Photoneutron energy spectra and yields from carbon and
oxygen were measured using 31 MeV Bremsstrahlung. The
energy  spectra  of  the   photoneutrons   from   the
O-16(gamma,n) reactions show pronounced structure.
Two spectra for each target were obtained  by  using
two different tunings of the discriminator.
Data were compiled in the SCJAD of Saratov
State University.
Corrected by SD and VV: Updated to new
date formats, lower case,  STATUS, DATA-ERR -> ERR-S,
PART-DET, REACTION code corrected in SUBENTs 004,007.
Graphite target was used.

the direction of observation.
